title: justicia filibracteolata var. leucantha
intro: Justicia filibracteolata var. leucantha, also known as the White Justicia, is a perennial plant species native to tropical regions, particularly in Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Justicia filibracteolata var. leucantha include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
